## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Validation

- [ ] `python3 scripts/plugins_repo.py validate`
- [ ] `mvn -B -ntp package`

## Conventional Commit Title

Use a PR title that can be squashed directly:

- `feat(golemcore/telegram): ...`
- `fix(golemcore/whisper): ...`
- `build(repo): ...`
